ddls:
CREATE TABLE "team_season_performance" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "batting" REAL /* Batting performance metric */,
  "base_running" REAL /* Base running performance metric */,
  "fielding" REAL /* Fielding performance metric */,
  "positional" REAL /* Positional play metric */,
  "offense" REAL /* Offensive performance metric */,
  "defense" REAL /* Defensive performance metric */,
  "league_factor" REAL /* League factor influencing the metrics */,
  "replacement_level" REAL /* Replacement level metric */,
  "rar" REAL /* Replacement-Level Above Average (RAR) */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement (WAR) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary information (if available) */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the team in the league for the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team made the playoffs */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team won the championship */,
  "total_salary" TEXT /* Total salary of the team for the season */,
  "average_salary" TEXT /* Average salary of the team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseball team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league for that season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "championship_date" TEXT /* Date of the championship game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary information for the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Player's batting side */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Player's throwing side */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Player's biographical information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "salary_amount" TEXT /* Salary amount for the player in the given season */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract ends */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Free Agent, Restricted Free Agent) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contract */,
  "performance_bonus" TEXT /* Performance-based bonus information */,
  "signing_bonus" TEXT /* Signing bonus information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_office_location" TEXT /* Location of the league's office */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "home_games" INTEGER /* Number of home games played */,
  "away_games" INTEGER /* Number of away games played */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home game wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away game wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home game losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away game losses */,
  "run_differential" INTEGER /* Difference between runs scored and runs allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
